svg.text: Manage tax-exempt customers, nonprofits, government accounts, and catering orders

✓ All taxes waived — FULL EXEMPT (8.875% total)
City purchasing account — PO required for orders over $500
RECENT TAX-EXEMPT SALES — CITY OF NEW YORK
Mark an order tax-exempt at the register
Tax exemption stored in pos_tax_exempt_accounts. Applied to order via pos_orders.tax_exempt_account_id.
Tax waived logged in pos_payments.tax_waived_cents. Certificate PDFs stored in Supabase Storage (private bucket, signed URLs).
Audit trail: pos_tax_exempt_events (who applied, when, PO#). Renewal reminders via Supabase cron + SendGrid.
Table references: pos_tax_exempt_accounts · pos_orders · pos_payments · pos_tax_exempt_events · Supabase Storage (bucket: tax-certificates)
